task: Implement instance and alert list filtering surfaces
acceptance_criteria: `/control/instances` and `/alerts` expose explicit filter contract, typed client support, and web filter UI without regressing current list flows
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/integration/control_plane/test_control_plane.py tests/api/alerting/test_alerting_contract.py && pnpm openapi:check && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck
notes: Closed by adding service-layer filters, query params on both list routes, typed client filter objects, server-rendered GET filter forms, updated OpenAPI snapshot, and focused API/web tests

task: Persist audit logs and expose minimum query surface
acceptance_criteria: Audit logs stop depending on `InMemoryAuditRepository` and a minimum read path exists for key control-plane actions
notes: Closed by adding `audit_entries`, `PostgresAuditRepository`, admin-only `/auth/audit-entries`, org-scoped audit reads, v8 PostgreSQL schema contract, and focused auth/postgres/schema gates

task: Implement user and role management product surface
acceptance_criteria: Platform administrators can list and manage users/roles through explicit API/UI flows that respect existing RBAC and organization scope
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/api/auth tests/api/rbac && pnpm openapi:check && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck
notes: Boundary frozen to organization-scoped admin flows for listing users, inspecting effective permissions, and updating roles for existing users; excludes IAM-style expansion

acceptance_criteria: Instance detail explicitly exposes TPS plus role/version readouts without regressing current analytics coverage boundaries
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/api/analytics && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck
notes: Keeps analytics scope bounded to the remaining PRD detail debt rather than inventing new dashboards

acceptance_criteria: Root signoff proves the closeout epic closed the targeted PRD debt without regressing existing product baselines
validation_command: pnpm openapi:check && uv run pytest tests/api/auth tests/api/rbac tests/api/alerting/test_alerting_contract.py tests/api/analytics tests/integration/control_plane/test_control_plane.py tests/integration/control_plane/test_control_plane_postgres.py tests/schema/test_schema_bootstrap.py && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web typecheck
